movies.title: All That's Left of You
movies.review: I feel bad rating this so lowly but as other reviews have pointed out, I found this movie to be too focused on trying to communicate a message in overly simple terms that it lost the raw pain and horror that is the Israeli occupation of Palestine. I felt the organ donation storyline too be overdone and drawn out.

movies.title: Nirvanna the Band the Show the Movie
movies.review: Uh idk why I expected but this was not it. Pretty funny in parts, I enjoyed reminiscing on everyone we’ve (rightfully) cancelled since 2008.

movies.title: Project Hail Mary
movies.review: A lot more enjoyable than the book. Love a space movie in cinemas. Only issue is that I don’t think Ryan Gosling gives primary school teacher vibes…

movies.title: Parasite
movies.review: Rewatch with a live orchestra with composer Jung Jae-il ✨
